functions.name: spawnAgentViaAPI
functions.return_type: Promise<{ status: number; body: Record<string, unknown> }>
functions.docstring: Spawn an agent via the gateway REST API and return the response.

functions.name: listAgentsViaAPI
functions.return_type: Promise<{ status: number; body: Record<string, unknown> }>
functions.docstring: List agents via the gateway REST API.

functions.name: getAgentViaAPI
functions.return_type: Promise<{ status: number; body: Record<string, unknown> }>
functions.docstring: Get a single agent via the gateway REST API.

functions.name: terminateAgentViaAPI
functions.return_type: Promise<{ status: number; body: Record<string, unknown> }>
functions.docstring: Terminate an agent via the gateway REST API.

functions.name: _collectWSMessages
functions.docstring: Collect WebSocket messages for a given channel until a condition is met or timeout expires.
